title: Po_core po_self_seedling v1
description: PR-014 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Represents Po_self's 'seedling' state -- a bootstrap-evaluation record of whether accumulated pressure (blocked-trace / Viewer / semantic-jump / ethical) is high enough to warrant treating Po_self as a candidate for future self-growth. This is NOT an autonomous self-growth loop: evaluating a seedling only ever produces a status label, never a running growth process. See docs/contracts/PO_SELF_SEEDLING_CONTRACT_V1.md.

activation_source.description: Which input pressure was dominant (equal to activation_score) when this seedling was evaluated. 'none' when every input pressure is 0.

activation_score.description: max(blocked_trace_pressure, viewer_resonance_pressure, semantic_jump_pressure, ethical_pressure). See docs/contracts/PO_SELF_SEEDLING_CONTRACT_V1.md for why max() was chosen over a multiplicative formula.

activation_threshold.description: The threshold activation_score was compared against to decide status='seed_planned' vs 'candidate'.

input_pressures.description: Open key set of the individual pressures considered (e.g. blocked_trace_pressure, viewer_pressure, semantic_jump_pressure, ethics_delta_pressure). Every value is normalized 0..1.

status.description: PR-014 seed runtime only ever produces 'inactive' (activation_score == 0), 'candidate' (0 < activation_score < activation_threshold), or 'seed_planned' (activation_score >= activation_threshold). 'active_seed' and 'archived' are reserved for a future autonomous-growth phase and are never set by this PR's runtime -- no self-growth loop is started here.
